hero.title: Your site should be impossible to ignore.
hero.paragraph: We design web experiences that trigger something — a desire to stay, to come back, to share. For brands where image is an asset, not a checkbox.

card1.description: It has to be understood in three seconds. We never choose aesthetics over clarity — we make them work together.

card2.title: Your image is your first salesperson
card2.description: Before a call, before a meeting, your clients have already judged you. We build the version of you that makes people want to go further.

card3.title: One vision, from start to finish
card3.description: Design, development, and motion are thought through together — not handed off between providers. That consistency is what shows in the result.

card4.description: Every phase is a validation step. You're never left waiting without knowing where things stand. Control stays on your side — from intent to launch.

card1.description: Unique design, Next.js development, animations built to serve the brand — not to impress. No templates. Nothing recycled.

card2.description: When your product deserves to be experienced, not just seen. Configurators, virtual showrooms, brand animations with Three.js.

card3.description: Your site exists but no longer looks like you. We diagnose what's holding it back and rebuild it with intention — without starting from zero unnecessarily.

step1.title: 01 — Scoping
step1.description: Before creating anything, we understand. Your positioning, your clients, what your site needs to trigger in them. The outcome: a validated brief, a firm scope, zero ambiguity.

step2.title: 02 — Art Direction
step2.description: Moodboard, typography, palette, first key screens. You see the direction before development starts. Nothing is imposed — everything is justified.

step3.title: 03 — Development
step3.description: Next.js, animations, integrations. A preview environment accessible at any time. You follow progress in real time — no black box.

step4.title: 04 — Launch
step4.description: Testing, deployment, handover. You walk away with a site that runs and full ownership of what's in your hands.

item1.title: Streetwear Streaming
item1.description: Translating the energy of a cultural scene into a web experience. Art direction, animated typography, Next.js development with GSAP.

item2.title: Stay Where Elegance Meets the Horizon
item2.description: Creating the desire to book before even reading a single price. Immersive atmosphere, Core Web Vitals performance, local SEO.

projects.bottomText: Every project answers a precise question — not 'how do we make a nice site', but 'what should this site make people feel?'

cta.paragraph: A 30-minute session. No sales pitch — a real conversation about your project, your challenges, and what we could build together.

footer.description: Every project is custom-built to tell a story, strengthen a brand image, and leave a lasting impression.
footer.tagline: We don't build websites. We write scenes.
